# AvökatFinder Hungary
> English-speaking law firm directory for Hungary — expats, foreign nationals and international businesses.

## Site Structure
- / — Homepage, directory overview
- /practice-areas/ — 10 legal practice areas
- /cities/ — 5 Hungarian cities (Budapest, Debrecen, Pécs, Győr, Miskolc)
- /blog/ — Expat legal guides
- /dashboard/ — Saved firms (requires email unlock)

## Data Sources
Chambers Europe, Legal 500 EMEA, IFLR1000, US Embassy Budapest recommended lawyers list.

## Contact
info@avokatfinder.com
